_comment: File location manifest for sp-sync.sh reconciliation. Records skill/system file canonical paths, rename aliases, and version gates. schema_version gates the sp-sync.sh parser — bump when adding new fields/semantics and raise SCRIPT_SCHEMA_COMPAT in sp-sync.sh in the same commit.

sp_sync_script.purpose: Receiver of this manifest. Performs schema_version compat check at Step 0 (pre-fetch) and Step 1c (post-pull). Bump its SCRIPT_VERSION whenever Step logic changes; bump SCRIPT_SCHEMA_COMPAT only when it gains support for a newer manifest schema_version.

handbook.description: Cross-project general technical notes (renamed from knowledge_base on 2026-04-24), maintained by /kb. Not mirrored to .claude/skills/. Under sekai-workflow git — renames handled by git, no manifest cleanup needed.
